attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_AP_CHECKS_ALL)

 minus
 select CHECK_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_AP_CHECKS_ALL
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.CHECK_ID = STG_CG1_AP_CHECKS_ALL.CHECK_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_AP_CHECKS_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME
